presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 01 — Talent Growth Engine
presentation.subtitle: How can we grow 5× faster without working 5× harder?

slides.title: Scene 1 — One Advisor Can Execute. But Can One Advisor Build an Enterprise?
slides.body: If your venture succeeds, what happens next?
slides.speakerNotes: Discussion: Can one advisor build a great venture and enterprise alone?

slides.title: Scene 2 — Every Engine Has a Capacity. What's Ours?
slides.body: Time, people, geography, skills, energy, opportunity — where does it get constrained?
slides.speakerNotes: Reality check: successful advisors hit a ceiling because of capacity, not skill.

slides.title: Scene 3 — So How Do Great Ventures Break Capacity Limits?
slides.body: If capacity is the problem, what should we redesign?
slides.speakerNotes: Brainstorm four areas to redesign the system — not just work harder.

slides.title: Scene 4 — What Levers Give Us the Biggest Breakthrough?
slides.body: What could we redesign to multiply capacity?
slides.speakerNotes: Brainstorm together — no wrong answers. Identify high-leverage levers.

slides.title: Scene 8 — Redesign One Stage. Make It 5× Better.
slides.body: Pick one Growth Engine stage. Map bottleneck, design solution, define impact. 20 min squad work.
slides.speakerNotes: Workshop launch — squads open Playbook mission for four-field capture.

slides.title: Scene 6 — Every Venture Runs on an Engine
slides.body: Today: Advisor → Prospects → Clients → Revenue. Tomorrow: Advisor → ??? → Enterprise.
slides.speakerNotes: We are designing the next engine — not improving the current one.

slides.title: Scene 5 — Let's Set Our 5× Challenge
slides.body: What would 5× look like for your venture?
slides.speakerNotes: Think big. Record 5× challenge in Playbook mission.

slides.title: Scene 9 — Present Your Redesigned Stage
slides.body: 3 min per squad: stage, bottleneck, solution, expected impact.
slides.speakerNotes: Present → Listen → Connect. Great solutions emerge when we share.

slides.title: Scene 7 — The Growth Engine Canvas
slides.body: Attract → Engage → Qualify → License → Activate → Produce → Multiply → Lead.
slides.speakerNotes: Discuss: which stages can technology and AI improve most?

slides.title: Scene 10 — Connect the Pieces. Build the Engine.
slides.body: From awareness to enterprise — one seamless engine enabled by technology, data, automation, AI.
slides.speakerNotes: How do our pieces work together for continuous momentum and 5× impact?

slides.title: Scene 11 — Great Engines Need Great Leaders
slides.body: Growth Engine → More Advisors → More Leaders → Greater Capacity.
slides.speakerNotes: Leadership is the multiplier. Systems create consistency; leaders create momentum.

slides.title: Scene 12 — Leadership Creates Leverage
slides.body: 1 advisor × 4 clients = ₱40K. 5 advisors × 20 clients = ₱200K. Leadership multiplies production.
slides.speakerNotes: If leadership creates more value, how should a venture reward it?
